title: Fabio Gobbato
text: Home * People * Fabio Gobbato Fabio Gobbato [1] Fabio Gobbato , an Italian computer chess programmer, and author of the UCI compliant chess engine Pedone , which had it tournament debut at the IGT 2013 , and already won the IGT 2014 with 6/7! He has further written the didactic open source chess engine QBBEngine to demonstrate how to use quad-bitboards [2] , and the tool ParserCutechess , which parses the output of Cutechess-cli to create match statistics [3] . In July 2021, Fabio Gobbato announced his chess engine Revenge as commercial successor of Pedone [4] .
